title: AFRY
description: Worked on a cybersecurity-oriented project during this internship. The result was a large system that can provide timely and accurate information.

title: Hobbyfynd.se
description: Enhanced the functionality of Hobbyfynd.se, which is based on the Sharetribe no-code platform, by integrating Swish Payments and Postnord Shipping. This greatly improved usability for the target audience.

title: Mini Marketplace
description: A simple and clean web-shop that can be used to buy and sell various things.

title: HotSpot
description: A system that integrates with the Swedish Police API to display all reported events on a map. Users could search and filter by date, location, and event type.

title: CashTime
description: Development of CashTime, an application used to track hours worked. The app estimates the user's monthly salary by taking OB-hours and overtime into account.
